steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank's verb is "an abstract cubist painting," which is singular. The phrase between dashes adds information but does not change that subject.

steps.title: Choose the matching verb
steps.content: A singular subject needs a singular verb. B and C are plural forms, and D is the unconjugated plural form "enter," so only the singular present-perfect form fits. The answer is A.
